meta.notes: All vectors produced by calling Photonic's actual source files (not a re-implementation). Inputs are deterministic; outputs are recorded for pyrxd to assert byte-equality. Regenerate when Photonic's spec changes.

wrap_cek_x25519.notes: Photonic-generated wrap. Pyrxd test unwraps with recipient_sk and asserts the recovered CEK matches the original input. Wrap output is not byte-deterministic (random ephemeral key + nonce).
